TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Tatukem, title = Tatukem, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tatukem} }

S.FORM: tatukem 龍葵 U kaulahan nu Pangcah,u sapisaray tu baedet tu lalud.
S.PHON: tato~u~ukəm ** o~u~u kao~u~uɾaħan no~u~u paŋʦaħ,o~u~u sapisaraj to~u~u b~b~vaəɬ~ɮət to~u~u ɾaɾo~u~uɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: tatukem 龍葵 U kaulahan nu Pangcah,u sapisaray tu baedet tu lalud.
S.PHON: tato~u~ukəm ** o~u~u kao~u~uɾaħan no~u~u paŋʦaħ,o~u~u sapisaraj to~u~u b~b~vaəɬ~ɮət to~u~u ɾaɾo~u~uɬ~ɮ.
